title: Want to hire someone for initial setup of Monday.com
excerpt: I need someone to setup Monday.com for a construction company to include leads, proposals, agreements, sub-contractors, order sheets and GAANT charts. You can contact me @ sandy@LuxoGrp.com

posts.author: Sandy (Sandy Schwartz)
posts.cookedHtml: I need someone to setup Monday.com for a construction company to include leads, proposals, agreements, sub-contractors, order sheets and GAANT charts. You can contact me @ sandy@LuxoGrp.com

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Sandy! welcome to the monday community! There are lots of great folks here who can help out with monday setup!

I have experience setting up multiple small companies for architecture/construction, lead management, gantt charts, project cost tracking, automatic invoicing and more.

I would be happy to sit down and talk through your specific needs to see if we are a good fit to work together!
You can schedule a call here: Calendly - Tim Little
I will send you a direct email as well!

Best!

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Sandy!

Setting up monday.com as a CRM and sales management is one of our specialties. We help companies all over the world leverage monday.com as a CRM on a weekly basis.

Feel free to book a free initial session to discuss further. I would love to get to know exactly what you need, how we can help and what your budget is.

Cheers!

Omnitas Consulting are platinum monday.com partners. We are located in Stockholm, Sweden and operate world wide. We are responsible for some of the most complex monday.com implementations out there. Thanks to this we have been awarded Best professional service partner by monday.com both 2019 and 2020.

posts.author: mdaxx (michael alldred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Thomas,

I am looking for someone to initially set up my account for an exhibition construction company. Can you please email me at mike@mdaxx.com if this is somehting you could help with.

Thank you,

Mike

posts.author: alicemgray (Alice Gray (Monday consulting))
posts.cookedHtml: If you are looking for seasoned monday com professionals to include leads, proposals, agreements, and GAANT charts in your Work OS, I would strongly recommend you to connect with certified monday.com consulting partners. When you seek consultation from certified professionals, you’ll get to know how to make the most of your project management tool. The reason being is that they know the ins and outs of monday com and how businesses can customize this Work OS tailored to their requirements and unlock the productivity of their workforce.

posts.author: KayaW (Kaya Wong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Sandy & @mdaxx

Welcome to the community! You are in the right place to find someone.
My name is Kaya with Kick Consulting. We are a Silver Partner with monday.com and have a global team of 14 (project/change managers, implementation specialists, developers) who have a tremendous amount of monday.com knowledge. We would love to help you set up and optimise your monday!

We offer a complimentary 1-hour initial meeting to discuss your pain points, needs, possible steps forward and options. You can book through this link. If you cannot find a suitable time, please let me know, and I will contact you with more availability.

I look forward to hearing from you.

Kaya
Kick Consulting
